# Chapter 06 Meta Notes - Chapter 6

## Meta entries

[[CH06-P0010]] Topic: Gets Marnette back to Master territory; sets her cover story (the carving).

[[CH06-P0020]] Topic: Establishes her discomfort with deception and the scale of what she’s attempting.

[[CH06-P0030]] Topic: A hard pivot into resolve: she commits.

[[CH06-P0040]] Topic: Morning Master district atmosphere; colony-wide mourning and Frost’s omnipresence.

[[CH06-P0050]] Topic: Shows her grief, guilt, and fixation on Frost’s last directive.

[[CH06-P0060]] Topic: Reintroduces Residence 7B as a preserved shrine; raises stakes and secrecy.

[[CH06-P0070]] Topic: Physical anxiety and the plan to “ask permission”… interrupted.

[[CH06-P0080]] Topic: Introduces Elara’s altered state and hints at long-held burdens.

[[CH06-P0090]] Topic: Elara’s calm recognition: she’s been expecting Marnette.

[[CH06-P0100]] Topic: Marnette’s prepared lie collapses immediately.

[[CH06-P0110]] Topic: Elara confirms the “chosen one” angle; Frost planted seeds, and Elara watched.

[[CH06-P0120]] Topic: The empty residence: absence, removal of medical gear, emotional echo-chamber.

[[CH06-P0130]] Topic: Marnette tests Elara’s loyalty; highlights risk of reporting.

[[CH06-P0140]] Topic: Elara reveals motive and guilt; she’s known the truth for 37 years.

[[CH06-P0150]] Topic: Deepens Elara’s complicity and endurance; moral weight across decades.

[[CH06-P0160]] Topic: Marnette asks the key ethical question: how do you live with it?

[[CH06-P0170]] Topic: Elara’s self-justifications crack; shows the psychology of preserving a lie.

[[CH06-P0180]] Topic: Movement toward the Archive; the residence becomes a pressure vessel.

[[CH06-P0190]] Topic: Introduces the ticking clock: maintenance inspection in two hours.

[[CH06-P0200]] Topic: Marnette’s practical panic: huge Archive, vague target.

[[CH06-P0210]] Topic: Elara gives a concrete lead: Frost’s notes and the “Mayfly” folder.

[[CH06-P0220]] Topic: Marnette offers partnership: “come with me?”

[[CH06-P0230]] Topic: Elara refuses; foreshadows how truth reshapes identity.

[[CH06-P0240]] Topic: Threshold moment: Archive door opens.

[[CH06-P0250]] Topic: Operational warning: don’t return, too many eyes; keeps tension “live.”

[[CH06-P0260]] Topic: Marnette steps in: point of no easy retreat.

[[CH06-P0280]] Topic: One-line gut punch: the room’s scale swallows her.

[[CH06-P0290]] Topic: Contrast with her earlier brief visit; this time she must truly look.

[[CH06-P0300]] Topic: Worldbuilding via the Archive’s immensity and eclectic contents.

[[CH06-P0310]] Topic: Expresses overwhelm; sets up the search problem.

[[CH06-P0320]] Topic: Re-centers the quest keyword: Mayfly, already haunting her.

[[CH06-P0350]] Topic: Signals a shift from denial to forensic reading.

[[CH06-P0360]] Topic: Phase 1 excerpt: genetic modification method (hard evidence).

[[CH06-P0370]] Topic: Phase 2 excerpt: apoptosis triggers and timed organ failure.

[[CH06-P0380]] Topic: Phase 3 excerpt: engineered religion as compliance tech.

[[CH06-P0390]] Topic: Staccato processing: the implications land.

[[CH06-P0400]] Topic: Revelation crystallizes: Church of Elom was designed, not “grown.”

[[CH06-P0410]] Topic: Physical reaction and urgency; she hunts for more proof.

[[CH06-P0420]] Topic: “I don’t understand the terms, but I understand the intent.”

[[CH06-P0430]] Topic: Search sequence; she finds “MAYFLY - Complete” (quest reward).

[[CH06-P0440]] Topic: Folder contents frame the bigger conspiracy as planned policy.

[[CH06-P0450]] Topic: She sits to read: transition from action to revelation.

[[CH06-P0470]] Topic: Document voice: cold bureaucratic language that nauseates her.

[[CH06-P0480]] Topic: The founders’ rationalization: population and resource stability.

[[CH06-P0490]] Topic: Marnette’s moral translation: lives treated like adjustable metrics.

[[CH06-P0500]] Topic: Presents the three “options,” showing the decision wasn’t accidental.

[[CH06-P0510]] Topic: The chosen option stated plainly: gene-limits + religious framework.

[[CH06-P0520]] Topic: Her disbelief loops; this is too big to accept on first read.

[[CH06-P0530]] Topic: “Humane and efficient” framing highlights institutional monstrosity.

[[CH06-P0540]] Topic: Bullet list of objectives: the system’s design goals and incentives.

[[CH06-P0550]] Topic: Key insight: they designed salves to die before learning enough to resist.

[[CH06-P0560]] Topic: Implementation details: hereditary changes, separation by markers.

[[CH06-P0570]] Topic: Twist: Masters are engineered too; both classes are manufactured.

[[CH06-P0580]] Topic: Signatures: makes the conspiracy personal by naming “heroes.”

[[CH06-P0590]] Topic: Frost’s handwriting recognized; the betrayal tightens.

[[CH06-P0600]] Topic: Frost as architect: complicates his deathbed plea.

[[CH06-P0610]] Topic: Returns to “forgive me,” now loaded with meaning.

[[CH06-P0620]] Topic: Explains Frost’s centuries of guilt and why he chose Marnette.

[[CH06-P0630]] Topic: Leaves forgiveness unresolved; keeps emotional conflict alive.

[[CH06-P0650]] Topic: More documents: the horror becomes systemic and abundant.

[[CH06-P0660]] Topic: Productivity/termination quote: salves explicitly optimized for extraction.

[[CH06-P0670]] Topic: The word “units” underlines dehumanization in a single jab.

[[CH06-P0680]] Topic: Quote on doctrine acceptance and “outliers” introduces suppression tactics.

[[CH06-P0690]] Topic: Links “outliers” to Thomas and generational memory; foreshadows allies/enemies.

[[CH06-P0700]] Topic: “Elon Protocol” quote: the name-change is deliberate policy.

[[CH06-P0710]] Topic: The god’s identity collapses: Elom is Elon; faith reframed as control.

[[CH06-P0720]] Topic: Emotional overload; grief and rage breach the surface.

[[CH06-P0730]] Topic: Flat declaration: no divine design, only engineering and manipulation.

[[CH06-P0740]] Topic: Personalizes stakes through grandmother and elders who died “on schedule.”

[[CH06-P0750]] Topic: Reinforces totality: prayers, deaths, acceptance are manufactured outputs.

[[CH06-P0760]] Topic: Marnette forces herself onward; resolve through nausea.

[[CH06-P0770]] Topic: She reaches for church protocols and is interrupted: danger enters.

[[CH06-P0920]] Topic: Panic beat: that detail could unravel everything.

[[CH06-P0930]] Topic: A plausible cover (Elara) is offered; shows how stories protect secrets.

[[CH06-P0940]] Topic: Inspector flags it in a report: creates future consequence.

[[CH06-P0950]] Topic: They leave; relief without safety.

[[CH06-P0960]] Topic: Silence as a beat, letting adrenaline drain.

[[CH06-P0980]] Topic: She can’t take more papers, so she chooses to memorize.

[[CH06-P1010]] Topic: Reaction confirms the religion-as-tool theme; faith reframed as a cage.

[[CH06-P1060]] Topic: Reinforces mass ignorance and the comfort of invisible bars.

[[CH06-P1230]] Topic: Irreversibility: she can’t return to her old self.
